fundamentals.name: ON Semiconductor Corporation
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: ON Semiconductor Corporation provides intelligent sensing and power solutions in Hong Kong, Singapore, the United Kingdom, the United States, and internationally. It operates through three segments: Power Solutions Group, Analog and Mixed-Signal Group, and Intelligent Sensing Group. The Power Solutions Group segment offers discrete, module, and integrated semiconductor devices designed to enable power conversion, including power switching, signal conditioning, and circuit protection technologies. Its Analog and Mixed-Signal Group segment designs and develops analog and mixed-signal solutions, including power management, sensor interface, connectivity, and standard products for automotive, industrial automation, AI data centers, computing, and mobile end markets. The Intelligent Sensing Group segment develops complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor image sensors, image signal processors, short-wave infrared sensors, and other products, as well as photon-counting technologies, including single-photon avalanche diode arrays and silicon photomultiplier devices for depth sensing, factory automation, safety systems, and robotics industries. ON Semiconductor Corporation was incorporated in 1992 and is headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona.

judgment.summary: ON Semiconductor Corporation is a high-growth company with strong margins and cash flow, but trades at a premium valuation and exhibits higher volatility.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat consensus EPS by 4.1%; next earnings date is 2026-08-03.
positives: Revenue growth 4.7% YoY, with analyst estimates for current Q and FY at 34.8% and 31.5% respectively.
Gross margin 42.7%, Operating margin 18.2%, and Profit margin 9.5% indicate strong profitability.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $1.28B supports operations and potential investments.
PEG ratio of 0.41 suggests growth may justify the current valuation.
Current ratio of 4.87 and Quick ratio of 2.80 indicate strong short-term liquidity.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 91.18 is exceptionally high, indicating a premium valuation.
Forward P/E of 29.17, while lower, still suggests significant growth expectations.
Return on equity of 7.5% and Return on assets of 6.8% are modest given the valuation.
Beta of 1.94 signifies higher volatility compared to the market.
Mean analyst target price of $105.45 is below the current spot price.

news.paragraph: ON Semiconductor Corporation (ON) is trading at a premium valuation, with a trailing P/E of 91.18 and a forward P/E of 29.17, supported by a PEG ratio of 0.41. The company recently reported Q1 2026 earnings that slightly beat estimates, and analysts project strong growth for the current quarter and fiscal year. Despite a high valuation, ON boasts solid margins and a healthy free cash flow, though its beta of 1.94 indicates higher volatility than the broader market.
